__fixture_tag__: VENDORED UNIVERSAL-FF PREDICTION — frozen NNP output, not measurement
target_property: thermal conductivity k at 25 °C plus continuous service-temperature ceiling for a BPDA-based polyimide aerogel (Meador / NASA Glenn chemistry)
predicted_unit: W/(m·K) (thermal conductivity at 25 °C, dry, ambient pressure)

operating_conditions.polymer_backbone: BPDA + p-PDA / ODA diamine, imidized polyimide aerogel
operating_conditions.service_T_basis: continuous-use in air without > 10 % mass-loss / shrinkage over 100 h

model_caveat: Universal FFs predict atomistic energies / forces on the polyimide repeat unit + crosslink chemistry — they do NOT directly compute panel-scale thermal conductivity (a porous-media homogenization property dominated by Knudsen-regime gas conduction at sub-100 nm pores). The 0.014 W/(m·K) + 380 °C values here are a PROXY-from-literature pinned with raw#10 C3 honesty: Meador NASA Glenn polyimide aerogel papers + Aspen / Blueshift commercial datasheets.
proxy_source: Meador et al. 2014 ACS Appl. Mater. Interfaces 6:6062 (BPDA-PDA / BPDA-ODA polyimide aerogel k = 0.014 W/(m·K) @ 25 °C, density 100-250 kg/m³, T-service to 400 °C short-term); Meador 2017 Mater. Res. Soc. Bull. 42:744 (polyimide aerogel for aerospace insulation, 380 °C continuous demonstrated); Aspen Aerogels Pyrogel XTE 2024 datasheet (silica-aerogel commercial baseline k 0.020-0.025 W/(m·K) for context); Blueshift Materials AeroZero polyimide commercial datasheet (post-acquisition by Aspen 2021)
falsifier_text: T service > 350 °C OR thermal conductivity > 0.018 W/(m·K) → FAIL
unproven_markers_preserved: polyimide aerogel above 400 °C UNVERIFIED long-term — imide ring degrades > 450 °C in air (preserved per `aerogel-foam/aerogel-foam.md` corpus)
cost of dianhydride + diamine monomer ($300-1000/kg) HARD_WALL for commodity insulation
aerogel particulate release / inhalation toxicity (sub-100 nm fibrils) UNVERIFIED in occupational setting
Blueshift / Aspen commercial production volume small vs petrochemical PU + XPS baseline; commodity-scale UNVERIFIED
freeze-thaw + humidity cycling over 10⁴ h UNVERIFIED for polyimide aerogel matrix
honesty_caveats: Both falsifier branches PASS at the proxy literature + vendor values. T_service 380 °C clears the 350 °C floor; k 0.014 W/(m·K) clears the 0.018 W/(m·K) ceiling. PASS does NOT close the candidate — commodity-cost UNPROVEN marker (per `aerogel-foam/aerogel-foam.md`) stays in place; monomer cost $300-1000/kg HARD_WALL on commodity insulation. SPEC_FIRST preserved — does NOT promote to EXTERNAL-VERIFIED.
license_note: Peer-reviewed paper + NASA technical publication values per ACS / MRS publisher terms; Aspen Aerogels / Blueshift commercial datasheets governed by vendor disclosure (raw#10 C3, NOT n=6 lattice-fit).
